articles.author: Anniek Bao
articles.title: Asia-Pacific markets trade mixed as investors assess Trump's hardened rhetoric on Iran war - CNBC
articles.description: Trump renewed threats on targeting Iran's civilian infrastructure if a peace deal is not reached in less than 24 hours, while signaling Iranian leadership is negotiating in earnest.
articles.content:
Asia-Pacific markets whipsawed in volatile trading on Tuesday, with major indexes flipping to losses in the morning session, as traders assess Iran war-related developments.

articles.title: Which Asian countries are passing through the Strait of Hormuz? - BBC
articles.description: Nations in the region have been keen to reach agreements as their economies are heavily reliant on Middle East energy.
articles.content: Iranian officials assured the "safe, unhindered and expeditious passage" for Philippines-flagged ships through the waterway, said Theresa Lazaro, the South East Asian country's foreign affairs secret… [+3 chars]
